backend.changelog: Manifest schema v2 — sha256 field added per artifact. No functional changes to runtime; parser groundwork for Phase 2 auto-apply.

cadBridge.changelog: Tray Apply Update (ADR-015 Phase 2(b)). The amber tray menu's 'Apply update — vX.Y.Z' item now downloads + relocates + restarts the agent in one click + one UAC prompt, replacing the previous stop-tray / download / extract / Setup.bat / Press-Enter loop. Setup.ps1 gets -Unattended and -InstallTo switches; the elevated install copies the staged bundle into the existing install dir, preserves server-url.txt, auto-closes on success. SHA256 verification on the gateway path is deferred to Phase 2.1; transport integrity comes from customer-LAN HTTPS today.
